reviews.comment:
Servicio, la atención de los empleados, la predisposición para brindarle todo lo que el viajero necesita. Ponen lo mejor de si. La higiene de los baños. Insuperable!

(Translated by Google)
The service, the staff's attention, their willingness to provide everything the traveler needs—they do their best. The cleanliness of the restrooms is unbeatable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NmFLVzFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios. Lindo lugar para parar, tiene árboles y gran estacionamiento. Tenia todas las clases de nafta

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms. Nice place to stop, with trees and a large parking lot. They had all types of gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5a2ZqbmlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Como casi todas las estaciones de servicios del ACA, su presencia es estratégica en un lugar de la Patagonia Central. Baños limpios, buena atención, combustibles YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Like almost all ACA service stations, its location is strategic in Central Patagonia. Clean restrooms, good service, YPF fuels.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NHRDbzF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Falta un espacio para tomar algo calentito en invierno. afuera tiene un espacio verde lindo en primavera/verano. Bien los baños, la atención en general

(Translated by Google)
There's no place to get something warm to drink in winter. Outside, there's a lovely green space in spring/summer. The restrooms are fine, and the service is good overall.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNjd2ZExnEAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención. Lastima que nunca podés cambiar tus punto. Por qué nunca tienen. O no hay "sistema".

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's a shame you can never change your points. Why don't they have them? Or is there a "system" problem?
